title: Tank manifest.json (schema version 2)
description: Governance and integrity manifest embedded in a .ctx documentation pack.

schema_version.description: Schema version; always 2 for this format.

pack_digest.description: SHA-256 of the archive with pack_digest zeroed during computation.

normalized_content_hash.description: SHA-256 of all normalized chunk content concatenated in id order.

chunks.description: Total number of chunks in the pack.

pages.description: Total number of source pages in the pack.

created_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp when the pack was built.

created_by.description: Tool and version that built the pack (e.g. tank/0.1.1).

owner.description: Team or person responsible for this pack.

policy_profile.description: Named policy profile to associate with this pack.

source_url.description: Path or URL of the documentation source.

source_commit.description: Git commit hash at build time.

approval_ref.description: External ticket or PR reference (deferred feature).

source_tag.description: Git tag at build time (deferred feature).
